description: You are logged into the wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). A bookkeeping clerk accidentally entered two extreme typo values into the body measurements. Delete the two erroneous entries: a 'Body Fat' entry of 180.0 (%) and a 'Waist' entry of 820.0 (cm). Ensure only these two outliers are removed and all other historical measurement data is preserved.
